project.name: Core : SLEE : gRPC AS RA
project.description: JAIN SLEE Resource Adaptor that lets the USSD Gateway talk to an Application Server over gRPC (HTTP/2), mirroring the HTTP client RA: the gateway is the gRPC client, the AS is the gRPC server. Carries the session id (correlation id) so the AS can keep per-session state across MO (pull) and NI (push) interactions.
